infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs access to location to show your position on the map and provide location-based safety features.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to camera to take photos for identity verification.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to photo library to upload documents for identity verification.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Travel Guardian to use your location to provide safety features and emergency services.
